# Sync ROADMAP.md to the 2026-07-16 operator scope rulings

## Context

The operator issued four v13.2 scope rulings in the 2026-07-16 live session (recorded on the scope ledger D#15209, ruling comment + the per-ticket milestone edits already executed): #13377 Electron shell IN (polish epic — the shell exists in `harness/`), the #15145 chain IN, **#14570 IN as Golden Path 2 work**, #14781 stays self-select. ROADMAP.md now contradicts one ruling and lacks the ledger pointer.

## The Problem

Two drift points in the release-scope SSOT:

1. The **Deferred** list still names #14570 inside the v13.3 traction-completion line — but the operator pulled #14570 into v13.2 (GP2). A reader following the ROADMAP would wrongly treat active milestone work as deferred (the exact contradiction I flagged on the ledger before the ruling resolved it the other way).
2. The **Session intake** paragraph routes contributors to D#14561 + milestone #9 but not to the living scope ledger (D#15209, linked from the milestone description since today) — the working coverage-map the operator asked for is invisible from the SSOT that anchors session intake.

## The Fix

Two surgical edits to `ROADMAP.md`:

- Deferred list, v13.3 line: remove `#14570` (keep #14569 and the rest verbatim — only #14570 was ruled in).
- Session-intake paragraph: add the scope-ledger pointer (D#15209) alongside D#14561 and the milestone.

No re-planning, no framing changes — the edits mirror explicit operator rulings only.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` deferred list no longer names #14570; #14569 and all other deferred entries unchanged.
- [ ] Session-intake paragraph links D#15209 as the live scope ledger.
- [ ] No other ROADMAP content changes (diff is exactly the two edits).

## Out of Scope

- Any further roadmap re-planning (cornerstone prose, v14 horizon) — operator territory.
- The ledger itself (maintained on D#15209).

## Related

D#15209 (scope ledger + ruling record) · #14570 (milestoned v13.2 today) · #14565 (GP2 epic) · milestone #9.
